id.description: Computed from the raw API's date field (bare computed_fields reference), matching legacy's mapRecord fallback (no id/ags/abbreviation/name on a history entry, so first() resolves date).

date.description: RFC3339 date string; also published as x-cursor-field, matching legacy's CursorFields: []string{"date"} — neither connector filters or advances reads by it server-side (no request_param wired).

stream.description: Static-literal computed_field naming which stream this record came from, matching legacy's derived marker field.
